name: Advanced
description: B2 · C1 · C2 — Upper-Intermediate to Mastery vocabulary

words.definition: A speed or pace that is surprisingly fast or remarkable.
words.example1: The city's population grew at an astonishing rate during the industrial revolution.
words.example1Situation: Siz shahar rivojlanishi va demografik o'zgarishlar haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Technology is advancing at an astonishing rate, transforming how we live and work every decade.
words.example2Situation: Siz texnologik taraqqiyot va uning jamiyatga ta'siri haqida munozara qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The proliferation of digital communication platforms at an astonishing rate has fundamentally altered the dynamics of interpersonal relationships and reshaped the boundaries between public and private discourse in contemporary society.
words.example3Translation: Raqamli kommunikatsiya platformalarining hayratlanarli tezlikda tarqalishi zamonaviy jamiyatda shaxslararo munosabatlar dinamikasini tubdan o'zgartirdi va ommaviy va shaxsiy nutq o'rtasidagi chegaralarni qayta shakllantirdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz raqamli texnologiyalar va ijtimoiy o'zgarishlar bo'yicha akademik tadqiqot ishini himoya qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: So crowded with traffic or people as to hinder or prevent freedom of movement.
words.example1: The roads were so congested that it took two hours to travel just five kilometres.
words.example1Situation: Siz shahar transporti muammolari haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Congested urban centres are forcing city planners to rethink public transport infrastructure.
words.example2Situation: Siz shahar rejalashtirish va infratuzilma rivojlanishi haqida muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The chronically congested arterial roads in the metropolitan area represent a significant economic burden, costing billions annually in lost productivity, increased fuel consumption, and deteriorating air quality that disproportionately affects lower-income communities.
words.example3Translation: Metropoliten hududidagi doimiy tirbandlik arterial yo'llari iqtisodiy yuk bo'lib, har yili yo'qolgan unumdorlik, ko'paygan yoqilg'i sarfi va past daromadli jamoalarga mutanosib ravishda ta'sir qiluvchi yomonlashgan havo sifati tufayli milliardlarga tushadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz shahar iqtisodiyoti va transport siyosati bo'yicha konferensiyada ma'ruza qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To cause something to happen; to have a particular consequence.
words.example1: Heavy rain resulted in widespread flooding across the region.
words.example1Situation: Siz tabiiy ofatlar va ularning oqibatlari haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Poor urban planning resulted in overcrowded neighbourhoods with insufficient public services.
words.example2Situation: Siz shahar rivojlanishi va uning muammolari haqida muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The systematic underfunding of public transportation infrastructure over several decades has resulted in a profound deterioration of service quality, ultimately discouraging modal shift away from private vehicle use and exacerbating existing congestion and environmental challenges.
words.example3Translation: Bir necha o'n yillar davomida jamoat transporti infratuzilmasini tizimli ravishda kam moliyalashtirish xizmat sifatining chuqur yomonlashishiga olib keldi va oxir-oqibat shaxsiy transport vositalaridan boshqa transport turlariga o'tishni qiyinlashtirdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz transport siyosati va barqaror shahar rejalashtirish bo'yicha siyosiy tahlil qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A person who travels in a vehicle, aircraft, or ship but is not the driver or crew.
words.example1: The train was delayed, leaving hundreds of passengers stranded at the station.
words.example1Situation: Siz transport muammolari va yo'lovchilar tajribasi haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Passenger numbers on the metro have increased significantly since the new line opened.
words.example2Situation: Siz shahar transporti statistikasi va rivojlanishi haqida muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The exponential growth in passenger demand on intercity rail corridors necessitates substantial capital investment in rolling stock procurement, track capacity expansion, and station modernisation to ensure service reliability and safety standards.
words.example3Translation: Shaharlararo temir yo'l yo'nalishlarida yo'lovchilar talabining eksponent o'sishi xizmat ishonchliligi va xavfsizlik standartlarini ta'minlash uchun harakatlanuvchi tarkibni sotib olish, yo'l quvvatini kengaytirish va stantsiyalarni modernizatsiya qilishga katta kapital sarmoya kiritishni talab qiladi.
words.example3Situation: Siz temir yo'l infratuzilmasi va transport iqtisodiyoti bo'yicha texnik hisobot tayyorlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To reach a destination after travelling.
words.example1: The delegation arrived at the conference centre two hours before the opening ceremony.
words.example1Situation: Siz rasmiy uchrashuvlar va tadbirlar haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Trains arriving late into the central station cause significant disruption to commuters.
words.example2Situation: Siz transport punktuallik muammolari haqida muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The failure of international aid shipments to arrive in conflict-affected regions within the critical response window has consistently undermined humanitarian efforts and prolonged civilian suffering in multiple protracted crises.
words.example3Translation: Xalqaro yordam jo'natmalarining ziddiyatli hududlarga muhim javob oynasi ichida yetib kelmasligi ko'p uzoq inqirozlarda gumanitar sa'y-harakatlarni doimiy ravishda susaytirdi va tinch aholining azobini uzaytirdi.
words.example3Situation: Siz xalqaro gumanitar operatsiyalar va logistika muammolari haqida hisobot yozayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The city where a country's government is located; or wealth used to generate income.
words.example1: London is the capital of England and one of the world's most visited cities.
words.example1Situation: Siz geografiya va shaharlar haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Attracting foreign capital into the region has been a key priority for the government.
words.example2Situation: Siz iqtisodiy rivojlanish va investitsiya siyosati haqida muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The concentration of capital, talent, and institutional resources within primate capital cities perpetuates regional economic disparities and creates self-reinforcing cycles of urban primacy that resist policy interventions aimed at promoting balanced territorial development.
words.example3Translation: Kapital, iste'dod va institutsional resurslarning asosiy poytaxt shaharlarda to'planishi mintaqaviy iqtisodiy tengsizliklarni kuchaytiradi va muvozanatli hududiy rivojlanishni rag'batlantirishga qaratilgan siyosat aralashuvlariga qarshilik ko'rsatuvchi shahar ustuvorligining o'z-o'zini kuchaytiradigan tsikllarini yaratadi.
words.example3Situation: Siz mintaqaviy iqtisodiy rivojlanish va shaharsozlik siyosati bo'yicha akademik maqola yozayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To permit someone to do something or let something happen.
words.example1: The new regulations allow cyclists to use bus lanes during peak hours.
words.example1Situation: Siz transport qoidalari va shahar harakatchanligi haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The bridge redesign will allow greater pedestrian flow between the two districts.
words.example2Situation: Siz shahar infratuzilmasi va piyodalar harakati haqida muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Regulatory frameworks that allow private operators to participate in public transport markets must be carefully designed to prevent service fragmentation, ensure equitable access, and maintain accountability mechanisms that protect the public interest.
words.example3Translation: Xususiy operatorlarga jamoat transporti bozorlarida ishtirok etishga ruxsat beruvchi tartibga solish doiralari xizmat parchalanishining oldini olish, tenglik bilan kirishni ta'minlash va jamoat manfaatlarini himoya qiluvchi javobgarlik mexanizmlarini saqlash uchun diqqat bilan ishlab chiqilishi kerak.
words.example3Situation: Siz transport bozori tartibga solish va davlat-xususiy sheriklik haqida siyosat hujjatini tayyorlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To go or come into a place or situation.
words.example1: Vehicles entering the city centre are now subject to a daily congestion charge.
words.example1Situation: Siz shahar transport to'lovlari va harakatlanish cheklovlari haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: As the train entered the tunnel, all mobile phone signals were lost.
words.example2Situation: Siz transport va texnologik cheklovlar haqida muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The decision of international investors to enter emerging market infrastructure sectors is contingent upon the existence of transparent legal frameworks, stable macroeconomic conditions, and credible regulatory commitments that mitigate political risk.
words.example3Translation: Xalqaro investorlarning rivojlanayotgan bozor infratuzilmasi sektorlariga kirishga qaror qilishi shaffof huquqiy doiralar, barqaror makroiqtisodiy sharoitlar va siyosiy xavfni kamaytiruvchi ishonchli tartibga solish majburiyatlarining mavjudligiga bog'liq.
words.example3Situation: Siz xalqaro infratuzilma moliyalashtirish va investitsiya xavfi tahlili haqida moliyaviy hisobot tayyorlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: Famous or important in history; having great historical significance.
words.example1: The historic agreement between the two nations ended decades of conflict.
words.example1Situation: Siz xalqaro munosabatlar va diplomatik yutuqlar haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The city centre is full of historic buildings that attract millions of tourists each year.
words.example2Situation: Siz madaniy meros va turizm haqida muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The historic expansion of the underground rail network represents a transformative investment in urban mobility that will reshape commuting patterns, stimulate economic development in underserved corridors, and reduce the city's dependence on private motor vehicles.
words.example3Translation: Metropoliten temir yo'l tarmog'ining tarixiy kengayishi shahar harakatchanligiga transformatsion investitsiya bo'lib, u qatnov naqshlarini o'zgartiradi, xizmat ko'rsatilmagan yo'nalishlarida iqtisodiy rivojlanishni rag'batlantiradi va shaharning shaxsiy avtomobillarga bog'liqligini kamaytiradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz shahar transporti loyihalarini jamoatchilikka taqdim etishda nutq so'zlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: A place where trains stop to allow passengers to get on or off.
words.example1: The new railway station will serve over fifty thousand passengers daily when completed.
words.example1Situation: Siz transport infratuzilmasi rivojlanishi haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The old railway station has been converted into a cultural centre while retaining its original architecture.
words.example2Situation: Siz meros binolarini qayta foydalanish va madaniy rivojlanish haqida muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The strategic positioning of intermodal railway stations as integrated transport hubs facilitates seamless passenger transfers between rail, bus, and active travel modes, thereby enhancing network efficiency and reducing journey times across the entire metropolitan transport system.
words.example3Translation: Intermodal temir yo'l stantsiyalarini integratsiyalashgan transport markazlari sifatida strategik joylashtirish temir yo'l, avtobus va faol sayohat rejimlari o'rtasida uzluksiz yo'lovchi o'tishlarini osonlashtiradi va shu bilan butun metropoliten transport tizimida tarmoq samaradorligini oshiradi va sayohat vaqtini qisqartiradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz intermodal transport rejalashtirish va shahar harakatchanligi strategiyalari haqida texnik hujjat tayyorlayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: To become progressively worse in quality, condition, or status.
words.example1: The patient's condition began to deteriorate rapidly overnight.
words.example1Situation: Siz tibbiy holat va kasallik borishi haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Relations between the two countries continued to deteriorate despite diplomatic efforts.
words.example2Situation: Siz xalqaro munosabatlar va siyosiy vaziyat haqida muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The systematic failure to invest in preventive maintenance has allowed critical infrastructure to deteriorate to a point where emergency repairs are now significantly more costly than proactive renewal programmes would have been.
words.example3Translation: Profilaktik texnik xizmat ko'rsatishga sarmoya kiritishdagi tizimli muvaffaqiyatsizlik muhim infratuzilmaning shunday darajada yomonlashishiga yo'l qo'ydiki, favqulodda ta'mirlash endi faol yangilash dasturlari bo'lganidan ancha qimmatroq.
words.example3Situation: Siz infratuzilma boshqaruvi va davlat xarajatlari samaradorligi haqida siyosat tahlili qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.example1: The neighbourhood is predominantly residential with very few commercial properties.
words.example1Situation: Siz shahar tuzilmasi va hududiy rejalashtirish haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: The workforce in this sector is predominantly female, reflecting historical patterns of employment.
words.example2Situation: Siz mehnat bozori va gender tengligi haqida muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: Economies that remain predominantly dependent on extractive industries face heightened vulnerability to commodity price fluctuations and are structurally ill-equipped to generate the high-value employment opportunities necessary for sustainable long-term development.
words.example3Translation: Qazib olish sanoatiga asosan bog'liq bo'lib qolgan iqtisodiyotlar tovar narxlarining o'zgarishiga nisbatan yuqori zaiflikka duch keladi va barqaror uzoq muddatli rivojlanish uchun zarur bo'lgan yuqori qiymatli ish o'rinlarini yaratish uchun tarkibiy jihatdan yetarli emas.
words.example3Situation: Siz iqtisodiy diversifikatsiya va rivojlanayotgan mamlakatlar taraqqiyot strategiyalari haqida akademik tahlil qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.definition: The basic physical and organisational structures needed for the operation of a society or enterprise.
words.example1: The government pledged billions to upgrade the country's ageing infrastructure.
words.example1Situation: Siz davlat sarmoyasi va rivojlanish rejalari haqida gaplashayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example2: Poor infrastructure in rural areas continues to hinder economic growth and access to services.
words.example2Situation: Siz qishloq rivojlanishi va mintaqaviy tengsizliklar haqida muhokama qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.
words.example3: The long-term competitiveness of any national economy is inextricably linked to the quality and resilience of its physical infrastructure, encompassing transport networks, energy systems, digital connectivity, and water management facilities.
words.example3Translation: Har qanday milliy iqtisodiyotning uzoq muddatli raqobatbardoshligi transport tarmoqlari, energetika tizimlari, raqamli ulanish va suv boshqaruvi inshootlarini o'z ichiga olgan jismoniy infratuzilmaning sifati va mustahkamligiga chambarchas bog'liq.
words.example3Situation: Siz milliy iqtisodiy strategiya va raqobatbardoshlik siyosati haqida yuqori darajadagi forumda taqdimot qilayotganda bu gapni ishlata olasiz.

words.example1: Smartphones are ubiquitous in modern society.
words.example1Situation: Siz do'stlaringiz bilan uchrashganda, ularning hammasi telefonda bo'lsa, bu haqda gapirmoqchi bo'lsangiz ishlatasiz.
words.example2: The influence of social media has become ubiquitous, shaping opinions and trends across different cultures and generations.
words.example2Situation: Siz texnologiya va jamiyat o'rtasidagi munosabatlar haqida muhokama qilayotganingizda ishlatasiz.
words.example3: In the contemporary globalized world, the ubiquitous presence of digital surveillance technologies raises profound ethical questions about privacy, autonomy, and the delicate balance between security and individual freedoms in democratic societies.
words.example3Translation: Zamonaviy globallashgan dunyoda raqamli kuzatuv texnologiyalarining hamma joyda mavjudligi maxfiylik, avtonomiya va demokratik jamiyatlardagi xavfsizlik va shaxsiy erkinlik o'rtasidagi nozik muvozanat haqida chuqur axloqiy savollarni tug'diradi.
words.example3Situation: Siz akademik maqola yozayotganingizda yoki universitetda ilmiy munozarada qatnashayotganingizda ishlatasiz.
